manifests.purpose: Own admin UI, API routes, and browser-facing operational views.
Own the coding-agent board, service boundaries, run-state controls, and cross-service governance without owning domain research logic.
Generate alpha search-space, expectation-gap, baseline, forecast, source-reliability, edge-decay, and review-court control-plane artifacts from existing point-in-time evidence.
Prepare and apply human-reviewed alpha evidence sidecars while keeping strict promotion guards separate from collection.
Own SEC, XBRL, IR, ClinicalTrials, and source capture ingestion jobs.
Evaluate earnings prediction datasets, policies, ledgers, and dashboard summaries.
Own ticker, CIK, issuer, drug, NCT, and corporate-action normalization.
Evaluate signal edge and forward-return diagnostics without owning upstream research collection.
Evaluate factor research, monthly factor backtests, and signal-edge diagnostics.
Own LLM calls, usage accounting, token budgets, and cost controls.
Own price, return, benchmark, calendar, and market data normalization artifacts.
Own cron, batch jobs, runtime controls, locks, systemd, Docker, and operational readiness.
Own shared contracts, library substrate, package policy, dependency policy, and cross-service technical infrastructure.
Own holdings, thesis notes, portfolio history, and portfolio-facing state artifacts.
Evaluate qualitative thesis evidence, forward-return overlays, and structural cross-check diagnostics.
Generate investment briefing outputs while keeping reporting side effects out of research and evaluation services.
Build research and prediction cross-check artifacts without owning evaluation policy or human review application.
Evaluate SEC five-year, live filing, and v3 action policy outputs.
